Configurations and data structures for Snowy platform boards, including I2C, power, buttons, and peripherals.


## Files
- **[board.h](board.h.md)**: Defines data structures and configurations for board components like buttons, I2C, audio, and power.
- **[board_definitions.h](board_definitions.h.md)**: Header file for selecting board-specific prototypes based on the defined board type.
- **[board_snowy_bb.h](board_snowy_bb.h.md)**: Configuration for the Snowy platform board, including I2C, power, buttons, and peripherals.
- **[board_snowy_evt.h](board_snowy_evt.h.md)**: Configuration for the Snowy EVT board, including I2C, power, buttons, accelerometer, magnetometer, and vibration settings.
- **[board_snowy_evt2.h](board_snowy_evt2.h.md)**: Configuration for the Snowy EVT2 board, including I2C, power, buttons, and peripherals.
